prompt: Create a 12-second Manim scene that explains one gradient descent step on a bowl-shaped loss curve. Show the current point, the local slope, and a short step to a lower point in the downhill direction.
completion:
from manim import *

class GradientDescentStepStory(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        title = Text("Gradient Descent Uses Local Slope", font_size=33).to_edge(UP)
        axes = Axes(x_range=[-3, 3, 1], y_range=[0, 5, 1], x_length=7.0, y_length=4.8, tips=False).shift(DOWN * 0.2)
        curve = axes.plot(lambda x: 0.45 * (x - 0.3) ** 2 + 0.8, x_range=[-2.8, 2.8], color=BLUE_D)
        start_x = 1.8
        end_x = 1.1
        start_point = Dot(axes.c2p(start_x, 0.45 * (start_x - 0.3) ** 2 + 0.8), color=YELLOW_D, radius=0.08)
        end_point = Dot(axes.c2p(end_x, 0.45 * (end_x - 0.3) ** 2 + 0.8), color=GREEN_D, radius=0.08)
        tangent = Line(axes.c2p(1.2, 2.3), axes.c2p(2.3, 1.3), color=ORANGE, stroke_width=4)
        step_arrow = Arrow(start_point.get_center(), end_point.get_center(), buff=0.06, color=GREEN_D, stroke_width=5)
        caption = Text("A positive slope means step left here to move downhill.", font_size=22, color=WHITE).to_edge(DOWN)
        caption_group = VGroup(BackgroundRectangle(caption, fill_opacity=0.88, buff=0.14), caption)

        self.play(FadeIn(title), Create(axes), Create(curve), run_time=2)
        self.play(FadeIn(start_point), Create(tangent), run_time=2)
        self.play(GrowArrow(step_arrow), FadeIn(end_point), run_time=2)
        self.play(FadeIn(caption_group), Indicate(end_point, color=YELLOW_A), run_time=2)
        self.wait(1)

prompt: Create a 12-second Manim scene that explains binary search by repeatedly halving a sorted range. Show a target value, highlight the midpoint, then eliminate half the array twice until the target range is tiny.
completion:
from manim import *

class BinarySearchHalvingStory(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        title = Text("Binary Search Cuts the Range in Half", font_size=32).to_edge(UP)
        values = [3, 7, 12, 18, 24, 31, 39, 44]
        cells = VGroup(*[VGroup(RoundedRectangle(corner_radius=0.08, width=0.9, height=0.62, color=BLUE_D, fill_color=BLUE_E, fill_opacity=0.14), Integer(v, font_size=24)) for v in values])
        for cell in cells:
            cell[1].move_to(cell[0])
        cells.arrange(RIGHT, buff=0.14).shift(DOWN * 0.2)
        target = Text("target = 31", font_size=28, color=YELLOW_D).next_to(cells, UP, buff=0.45)
        range_one = SurroundingRectangle(VGroup(*cells[0:8]), color=GREEN_D, buff=0.08)
        range_two = SurroundingRectangle(VGroup(*cells[4:8]), color=GREEN_D, buff=0.08)
        range_three = SurroundingRectangle(VGroup(*cells[4:6]), color=GREEN_D, buff=0.08)
        mid_one = Arrow(cells[3].get_top() + UP * 0.45, cells[3].get_top() + UP * 0.06, buff=0, color=ORANGE)
        mid_two = Arrow(cells[5].get_top() + UP * 0.45, cells[5].get_top() + UP * 0.06, buff=0, color=ORANGE)
        mid_three = Arrow(cells[4].get_top() + UP * 0.45, cells[4].get_top() + UP * 0.06, buff=0, color=ORANGE)
        caption = Text("Each comparison removes half of the remaining search space.", font_size=22, color=WHITE).to_edge(DOWN)
        caption_group = VGroup(BackgroundRectangle(caption, fill_opacity=0.88, buff=0.14), caption)

        self.play(FadeIn(title), FadeIn(cells), FadeIn(target), run_time=2)
        self.play(Create(range_one), GrowArrow(mid_one), run_time=1.6)
        self.play(ReplacementTransform(range_one, range_two), ReplacementTransform(mid_one, mid_two), run_time=1.8)
        self.play(ReplacementTransform(range_two, range_three), ReplacementTransform(mid_two, mid_three), run_time=1.8)
        self.play(FadeIn(caption_group), Indicate(cells[5], color=YELLOW_A), run_time=2)
        self.wait(1)

prompt: Create a 12-second Manim scene that explains momentum exchange in a collision between two carts. Show one cart moving into a stationary cart, then after the collision show the first cart slowing while the second moves away.
completion:
from manim import *

class MomentumExchangeStory(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        title = Text("Momentum Can Transfer Between Carts", font_size=33).to_edge(UP)
        track = Line(LEFT * 4.2 + DOWN * 0.9, RIGHT * 4.2 + DOWN * 0.9, color=GRAY_B, stroke_width=4)
        cart_a = VGroup(RoundedRectangle(corner_radius=0.08, width=1.0, height=0.52, color=BLUE_D, fill_color=BLUE_E, fill_opacity=0.24), Text("A", font_size=22, color=BLUE_D)).shift(LEFT * 2.5 + DOWN * 0.4)
        cart_b = VGroup(RoundedRectangle(corner_radius=0.08, width=1.0, height=0.52, color=TEAL_D, fill_color=TEAL_D, fill_opacity=0.2), Text("B", font_size=22, color=TEAL_D)).shift(RIGHT * 1.0 + DOWN * 0.4)
        cart_a[1].move_to(cart_a[0])
        cart_b[1].move_to(cart_b[0])
        arrow_fast = Arrow(cart_a.get_right() + UP * 0.1, cart_a.get_right() + RIGHT * 1.0 + UP * 0.1, buff=0, color=YELLOW_D, stroke_width=5)
        arrow_slow = Arrow(cart_a.get_right() + UP * 0.1, cart_a.get_right() + RIGHT * 0.45 + UP * 0.1, buff=0, color=YELLOW_D, stroke_width=5)
        arrow_gain = Arrow(cart_b.get_right() + UP * 0.1, cart_b.get_right() + RIGHT * 0.9 + UP * 0.1, buff=0, color=GREEN_D, stroke_width=5)
        collision_flash = Flash(LEFT * 0.2 + DOWN * 0.4, color=ORANGE, line_length=0.3)
        caption = Text("After contact, some of cart A's momentum appears in cart B.", font_size=22, color=WHITE).to_edge(DOWN)
        caption_group = VGroup(BackgroundRectangle(caption, fill_opacity=0.88, buff=0.14), caption)

        self.play(FadeIn(title), Create(track), FadeIn(cart_a), FadeIn(cart_b), run_time=2)
        self.play(GrowArrow(arrow_fast), cart_a.animate.shift(RIGHT * 1.7), run_time=2)
        self.play(collision_flash, FadeOut(arrow_fast), run_time=0.8)
        self.play(cart_a.animate.shift(RIGHT * 0.35), cart_b.animate.shift(RIGHT * 1.1), GrowArrow(arrow_slow), GrowArrow(arrow_gain), run_time=2)
        self.play(FadeIn(caption_group), run_time=1.5)
        self.wait(1)

prompt: Create a 12-second Manim scene that explains why the median is less sensitive to an outlier than the mean. Show a cluster of values on a number line, then add one far-right outlier and compare how much the mean and median markers move.
completion:
from manim import *

class MedianOutlierResistanceStory(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        title = Text("The Median Resists a Far Outlier", font_size=33).to_edge(UP)
        line = NumberLine(x_range=[0, 12, 1], length=8.6, include_numbers=False).shift(DOWN * 0.2)
        base_values = [2, 3, 4, 5, 6]
        dots = VGroup(*[Dot(line.n2p(v), color=BLUE_D, radius=0.07) for v in base_values])
        mean_before = Dot(line.n2p(4), color=ORANGE, radius=0.09)
        median_before = Dot(line.n2p(4), color=GREEN_D, radius=0.09)
        outlier = Dot(line.n2p(11), color=RED_D, radius=0.08)
        mean_after = Dot(line.n2p(31 / 6), color=ORANGE, radius=0.09)
        median_after = Dot(line.n2p(4.5), color=GREEN_D, radius=0.09)
        mean_label = Text("mean", font_size=22, color=ORANGE).next_to(mean_after, UP, buff=0.18)
        median_label = Text("median", font_size=22, color=GREEN_D).next_to(median_after, DOWN, buff=0.2)
        caption = Text("The mean gets pulled hard, but the median moves only a little.", font_size=22, color=WHITE).to_edge(DOWN)
        caption_group = VGroup(BackgroundRectangle(caption, fill_opacity=0.88, buff=0.14), caption)

        self.play(FadeIn(title), Create(line), FadeIn(dots), run_time=2)
        self.play(FadeIn(mean_before), FadeIn(median_before), run_time=1.3)
        self.play(FadeIn(outlier), Transform(mean_before, mean_after), Transform(median_before, median_after), run_time=2.2)
        self.play(FadeIn(mean_label), FadeIn(median_label), FadeIn(caption_group), run_time=1.8)
        self.wait(1)

prompt: Create a 12-second Manim scene that explains enzyme saturation. Show a rate-versus-substrate curve that rises steeply at low concentration and then levels off near a maximum rate when most active sites are occupied.
completion:
from manim import *

class EnzymeSaturationPlateauStory(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        title = Text("Enzyme Rate Levels Off at Saturation", font_size=32).to_edge(UP)
        axes = Axes(x_range=[0, 8, 1], y_range=[0, 1.2, 0.2], x_length=7.0, y_length=4.8, tips=False).shift(DOWN * 0.2)
        curve = axes.plot(lambda x: 1.0 * x / (1.5 + x), x_range=[0.05, 7.5], color=BLUE_D)
        vmax = DashedLine(axes.c2p(0, 1.0), axes.c2p(7.7, 1.0), color=GREEN_D)
        vmax_label = Text("Vmax", font_size=22, color=GREEN_D).next_to(vmax, UP, buff=0.14)
        tracker = ValueTracker(0.6)
        probe = always_redraw(lambda: Dot(axes.c2p(tracker.get_value(), 1.0 * tracker.get_value() / (1.5 + tracker.get_value())), color=YELLOW_D, radius=0.08))
        caption = Text("More substrate helps early, but the curve flattens once sites are busy.", font_size=22, color=WHITE).to_edge(DOWN)
        caption_group = VGroup(BackgroundRectangle(caption, fill_opacity=0.88, buff=0.14), caption)

        self.play(FadeIn(title), Create(axes), Create(curve), run_time=2)
        self.play(Create(vmax), FadeIn(vmax_label), FadeIn(probe), run_time=1.8)
        self.play(tracker.animate.set_value(6.5), run_time=3)
        self.play(FadeIn(caption_group), run_time=1.5)
        self.wait(1)

prompt: Create a 12-second Manim scene that explains a transit light curve. Show a planet crossing in front of a star and a brightness plot on the right that dips during the transit and recovers afterward.
completion:
from manim import *

class TransitDimmingStory(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        title = Text("A Transit Produces a Temporary Brightness Dip", font_size=31).to_edge(UP)
        star = Circle(radius=0.85, color=ORANGE, fill_color=ORANGE, fill_opacity=0.34).shift(LEFT * 3.0 + DOWN * 0.1)
        planet = Dot(LEFT * 4.2 + DOWN * 0.1, color=BLUE_D, radius=0.16)
        axes = Axes(x_range=[0, 6, 1], y_range=[0.74, 1.05, 0.1], x_length=5.0, y_length=3.2, tips=False).shift(RIGHT * 2.4 + DOWN * 0.1)
        baseline = axes.plot(lambda x: 1.0, x_range=[0, 1.5], color=GRAY_B)
        dip = axes.plot(lambda x: 1.0 - 0.18 * np.exp(-((x - 3.0) ** 2) / 0.45), x_range=[1.5, 4.5], color=BLUE_D)
        recover = axes.plot(lambda x: 1.0, x_range=[4.5, 6.0], color=GRAY_B)
        tracker = ValueTracker(0.0)
        probe = always_redraw(lambda: Dot(axes.c2p(tracker.get_value(), 1.0 - 0.18 * np.exp(-((tracker.get_value() - 3.0) ** 2) / 0.45)), color=YELLOW_D, radius=0.07))
        caption = Text("When the planet blocks part of the star, the observed light drops briefly.", font_size=22, color=WHITE).to_edge(DOWN)
        caption_group = VGroup(BackgroundRectangle(caption, fill_opacity=0.88, buff=0.14), caption)

        self.play(FadeIn(title), FadeIn(star), FadeIn(planet), Create(axes), run_time=2)
        self.play(Create(baseline), Create(dip), Create(recover), FadeIn(probe), run_time=2)
        self.play(planet.animate.shift(RIGHT * 2.4), tracker.animate.set_value(3.0), run_time=2.5)
        self.play(planet.animate.shift(RIGHT * 2.2), tracker.animate.set_value(6.0), FadeIn(caption_group), run_time=2.5)
        self.wait(1)
